description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its width. The grooves are deep and dark, contrasting with the lighter, speckled stone material that makes up the rest of the block. The sides of the block are smooth and solid, with no visible joints or separations, giving it a monolithic appearance. The top surface's grooved pattern suggests it is designed to provide traction or drainage, making it suitable for outdoor or urban environments. The block is thick and robust, indicating significant weight and durability. There are no visible markings, engravings, or signs of weathering on the surfaces.
description: A thick, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and smooth, solid sides. The block is made of speckled stone and appears durable and heavy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat face and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, which run perpendicular to the viewer.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with grooves visible but no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the deep, evenly spaced grooves across the top.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or decorative element
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: no visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and unworn
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
